rationale: The query/hyp_abstract engine is a generating-function-plus-local-tree-approximation calculation (probability generating functions for incidence/arity distributions, derivatives at unit argument) that yields closed-form thresholds and sizes for a giant-component/core-percolation-style transition (explicitly, where 'naive unit-propagation-style peeling fails'). The candidate instead states it uses 'the cavity method' to do a 1RSB-style analysis of solution-space geometry (clustering, condensation, freezing transitions, coloring threshold) — a qualitatively different statistical-mechanics machinery, not a generating-function/peeling-threshold derivation, so method_coherence is FALSE. The object does genuinely shift: the query studies empirical/real-world network structure (WWW, collaboration graphs) via degree-distribution random graph theory, while the candidate studies the solution space of a combinatorial constraint-satisfaction problem (proper colorings of random graphs) — matching the CSP-flavored target field, so object_difference is TRUE."
